## Problem

Describe the user or maintenance problem.

## Changes

- 

## Safety and recovery

Explain idempotency, backups, secrets, read-only modes, interruption behavior, and rollback when relevant.

## Validation

- [ ] PowerShell syntax
- [ ] Relevant PowerShell tests
- [ ] Bash syntax and tests when applicable
- [ ] PSScriptAnalyzer, ShellCheck, Markdownlint, and Actionlint
- [ ] Manual validation described when automation cannot cover the behavior

## Review checklist

- [ ] Task detection is read-only
- [ ] Apply is repeatable
- [ ] Verification checks the intended final state
- [ ] Documentation and changelog are updated
- [ ] No credentials or private material are included
